cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the opportunities for professional advancement and the global exposure provided by the company's diverse client base.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff frequently cite the comprehensive benefits package and access to continued education as key positive aspects of their employment.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees appreciate the stability and remote work options, though experiences with work-life balance vary significantly.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: A portion of the workforce reports positive experiences with inclusive and supportive team environments.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees note the relative stability of the company as a large IT services provider, though this is balanced by concerns about project continuity.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback indicates dissatisfaction with salary growth, perceived low pay, and the pressure of managing bench time.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees express frustration over internal politics and a perceived lack of transparency in promotion and leadership decisions.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports highlight difficulties in achieving work-life balance and concerns regarding the company's responsiveness to employee needs.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some reviews describe a fear-based management style and concerns regarding hiring practices and job security.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees report feelings of isolation and frustration with management's perceived lack of support for career development and personal needs.
